summary: Iter8 (slot lock + reverse-geocode + empty-tiffin accounting + dashboard CMS + dispatch info on payloads) tested. Backend pytest 19/19 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iter8.py. Frontend smoke-tested via cookie-injected admin session: /admin/dashboard-editor renders with 7 sections + 6 text inputs + 4 color pickers + up/down/eye/save/reset; /admin/live renders admin-live-map + dispatch-needed banner when dispatch coords unset; /track renders track-page. Save→GET→Reset round-trip verified via curl: history.visible toggles off via PATCH and back to True via /admin/dashboard/config/reset (default config restored). Reverse-geocode test passed against Delhi (28.6139,77.2090) — endpoint returns 200 with pincode (or null on rate-limit, both spec-compliant).
action_items: (env-config carry-over from iter7) Backend .env still has live RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET — payment-mock-mode tests in iter1-iter6 will continue to fail until either Razorpay keys are blanked or those fixtures are updated to bypass /api/payments/order. Not an iter8 regression.
(tech-debt) AdminLiveMap stat-card testids remain dynamic via slugified label (carry-over from iter7).

(minor) Subscriber dashboard's history-card visibility cleanly reflects PATCH/Reset on backend; in UI flow the Reset button click should be allowed a ~1s settle for React state to drain before re-querying — not a product bug, just a UI-test timing observation.
critical_code_review_comments: delivery.py /admin/delivery/roster/{rid}/mark on `delivered` requires payload.lat+lng AND customer.lat+lng — if customer hasn't pinned location, admin gets 400. UI handles this but admin CSV-import scenario could surprise. Consider an admin-override flag for trusted manual marks.
_record_empty_collection_db raises 400 'No empty tiffins outstanding' when balance is 0 — fine, but the boy-side empties list is filtered to balance>0 so this is mostly defensive. Good.
_load_dashboard_config auto-creates the doc on first GET — public endpoint can therefore write to DB on cold-start. Low risk but consider pre-seeding on startup to avoid a write during a public read.
PATCH /admin/dashboard/config sanitizes sections to id/label/visible/order only — drops any unknown fields silently. Frontend sends only those, so OK, but worth documenting.
_reverse_geocode_pincode hits Nominatim with a 6-second timeout and no caching — heavy traffic could rate-limit and degrade location-pin UX. Consider caching by (rounded lat,lng) in Mongo for 24h.
/auth/location returns pincode:null silently when geocoding fails — UI can't tell the user 'try again' vs 'we couldn't determine your pincode'. Consider returning a `geocode_status` field.

/boy/empties filters by boy.assigned_pincodes — but if a customer's pincode field is stale (different from address-extracted), they may not appear. Reverse-geocode flow now populates user.pincode authoritatively, so this is consistent post-iter8.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iter8.py (new — 19 tests covering all iter8 spec items)

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 iter8 tests). Pre-iter7 Razorpay-mock-mode regressions persist due to live keys in .env, NOT iter8 bugs.
success_rate.frontend: Smoke verified: admin-dashboard-editor (sections=7, texts=6, colors=4, all required testids present), admin-live-map, track-page render correctly with cookie-injected admin session. End-to-end save/reset of dashboard config validated via direct API.

test_credentials: Direct-Mongo-injected TEST_-prefixed admin/subscriber/delivery_boy sessions. session_token cookie used for UI tests (matches backend Cookie auth path).
seed_data_creation: Per-test transient TEST_-prefixed users + delivery_boys + daily_rosters + tiffin_movements, all cleaned up via Mongo delete in fixture teardown. delivery_settings snapshot/restore fixture protects production windows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run iter8 with: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://dining-pass-scan.preview.emergentagent.com MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database pytest backend/tests/test_iter8.py -v`. Important: tests now snapshot+restore delivery_settings around slot-lock cases via the `reset_settings_after` fixture. The slot-closed test prefers '23:55-23:59' but auto-falls-back to '00:00-00:01' if wall-clock IST happens to be inside the chosen closed window — handles edge case gracefully. For UI testing, set the `session_token` cookie on the dining-pass-scan.preview.emergentagent.com domain (Secure, SameSite=None, path=/) — frontend axios uses withCredentials:true so cookie auth is the path that matches production. Reverse-geocode tests are tolerant of Nominatim rate-limit (pincode:null is acceptable per spec).
